Footer.tagline: VS Code extension for React developers

Hero.title: React Component
Hero.description: Generate fully structured React components from your own templates — with styles, index files, types, and tests — without leaving VS Code.

HowItWorks.title: How it works
HowItWorks.subtitle: Three steps from folder to component
HowItWorks.step0Desc: In VS Code Explorer, right-click any folder and choose "Create React Component".
HowItWorks.step1Desc: Enter the component name. Casing is applied automatically based on your settings.
HowItWorks.step2Desc: Select from your custom templates. Files are generated instantly.

Features.title: Everything you need
Features.subtitle: Flexible, template-driven component scaffolding
Features.item0Desc: Create components from your own .jsx / .tsx templates stored in the .react-templates folder.
Features.item1Desc: Supports both .tsx and .jsx workflows with a single toggle in settings.
Features.item2Desc: Auto-generate CSS, SCSS, or CSS Modules alongside every component.
Features.item3Desc: Barrel re-exports and types.ts generated from configurable templates.
Features.item4Desc: Scaffold test files in a tests/ subfolder using your own test template.
Features.item5Desc: Choose PascalCase, camelCase, kebab-case, snake_case or lowercase — per file and folder.
Features.item6Desc: Drop a .rcmakerrc.json next to package.json — no more switching global settings.
Features.item7Desc: Just right-click any folder in Explorer and choose "Create React Component". Done.

Config.title: One file, one project
Config.desc1: Drop a .rcmakerrc.json next to your package.json and the extension picks it up automatically. No more touching global settings when switching between projects.
Config.desc2: Local settings take priority over global ones. Missing fields fall back gracefully.

CTA.title: Ready to speed up your workflow?
CTA.desc: Install from the VS Code Marketplace and start generating components in seconds.

Docs.metaDesc: RC Maker — VS Code extension documentation

Consent.message: We use analytics to improve your experience. You can opt out at any time.
